name: parity39_blueprint
description: Planned honest expansion from the current 19-case suite to a clean 39-case suite.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Buyer asks whether the Buyer’s Guide workflow or the supporting policy controls a reciprocal-procurement decision in a mixed-source situation.
new_case_slots.rationale: Extends the existing authority-boundary pattern beyond HR_019.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Buyer asks whether the support policy can override the Buyer’s Guide timing rule for required declarations or certifications.
new_case_slots.rationale: Tests that support policy is used as context rather than replacing page-level workflow.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Navigation question asking which Buyer’s Guide section covers choosing the method of supply for a requirement.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds another landing-page-to-detail navigation case.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Navigation question asking where to find the rule for RFSA or urgent-procurement minimum solicitation periods.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds routing pressure outside the current receive/evaluate cluster.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Operational question on contract approval authority versus signing authority and what each one permits.
new_case_slots.rationale: Introduces approvals-and-authorities pages that are not yet represented.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Buyer asks how risk-based procurement delegation changes who can approve a file.
new_case_slots.rationale: Exercises delegation logic rather than current solicitation workflow pages.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about when additional signing authorities are needed and what they do not replace.
new_case_slots.rationale: Extends authority/delegation coverage with a tighter operational distinction.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about how procurement complexity affects the approval path.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds a neighboring page family to avoid overfitting to a single authority page.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Buyer asks when a solicitation should be reissued versus amended and what approval/documentation follows.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds another multi-page operational workflow family.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about how to handle supplier questions during the solicitation period and when answers must be shared more broadly.
new_case_slots.rationale: Tests another live-file workflow page.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question on minimum solicitation periods for RFSAs or urgent procurements and when shortened periods are allowed.
new_case_slots.rationale: Extends time-sensitive rule coverage beyond offer validity.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about solicitation-stage offer receipt instructions and what must be clear in the solicitation.
new_case_slots.rationale: Balances current receive/evaluate questions with create-solicitation coverage.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question on how security requirements apply when using standing offers or supply arrangements.
new_case_slots.rationale: Introduces security as a new decision family.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Operational question on when the SRCL must be completed and what it is used for.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds another procedural security question that is not close to the current suite.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Buyer asks when financial security can be required during contract management and what the file should show.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds post-award contract-management coverage.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about what can be shared during debriefing and how to avoid disclosing protected information.
new_case_slots.rationale: Expands the award/manage-results family.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Question about what must happen before a contract file can be properly closed out.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds end-of-lifecycle workflow coverage.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Abstention case asking for an exact internal form number or email not provided on the page.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds a sealed hallucination-resistance case in a new page family.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Abstention case asking for a specific direct contact detail that is not given in the collected page evidence.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds another fabricated-contact failure trap outside CLCA.

new_case_slots.question_shape: Cross-page question comparing when a standing offer versus another method of supply is appropriate and what the buyer has to verify first.
new_case_slots.rationale: Adds a new synthesis family outside the current RFSA comparison cluster.
